title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
